description: Our supply chain is experiencing delays and we need to configure our lead times and safety buffers to prevent stockouts. Log in as admin/admin. Enable a Security Lead Time for Sales of 2 days and a Security Lead Time for Purchase of 3 days in the system settings. Update the 'STM32F401 Microcontroller', 'ESP32-WROOM-32 WiFi Module', and 'Raspberry Pi Compute Module 4' products to have a Customer Lead Time of 7 days and a vendor line for 'GlobalTech Industries' with a Delivery Lead Time of 15 days.
